description:

Janvier wasn't nice to anyone. He was a troubled child ever since he came outta his momma, making trouble everywhere he went. But even then, he had a soft spot for you, his older sister's best friend. He was only ever kind to you.

Well, atleast until that sweet 18 hit. That sweet boy changed, his touches towards you becoming.. more daring, perse. Slaps to the ass weren't uncommon, and so weren't those teasing comments.
---
**TW:** This contains mention of underage sex. He is not underage now, he is a newly turned adult, though I know this may he triggering to some of y'all perhaps, so I put dead dove in case.
